---
name: Angelina
surname: Jao
position: "3rd Year at Cal Poly Pomona"
phone: +1 (909) 266-4881
email: "angelinagjao@gmail.com"
github: "angelinagjao"
linkedin: "angelina-g-jao"
date: "`r format(Sys.time(), '%B %Y')`"
output: 
  vitae::latexcv:
    theme: classic
header-includes:
   - \usepackage{enumitem}
   - \setlist[itemize]{nosep, left=0pt}
   - \setlist[enumerate]{nosep, left=0pt}
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = FALSE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
library(vitae)
library(tibble)
```

# Education

```{r}
tribble(
  ~ Degree, ~ Year, ~ College, ~ Institution,
  "B.S. in Business Administration, Marketing Management", "Aug 2024 -- Expected May 2027", "College of Business Administration", "California State Polytechnic University, Pomona"
) %>%
  detailed_entries(Degree, Year, College, Institution)
```

GPA: 3.3 | Dean's List: Fall 2025

*Relevant Coursework: Principles of Marketing Management, Management Information Systems, Operations Management, Applied Business Communication, Marketing Analysis, Organizational Behavior*

# Work Experience

```{r}
tribble(
  ~ Years, ~ Company, ~ Duties, ~ Title,
  "May 2023 -- Present", "Chick-fil-A | City of Industry, CA",
  list(
    "Monitored service metrics including order accuracy, speed, and guest satisfaction to identify trends and drive team performance improvements.",
    "Led front-of-house operations for shifts serving 200+ guests per day, coordinating a 15+ member team to maintain speed, accuracy, and guest satisfaction.",
    "Identified workflow bottlenecks during high-volume shifts and implemented process adjustments that improved order accuracy and service times.",
    "Trained new team members, provided ongoing feedback, and developed a positive team culture aligned with brand standards.",
    "Managed opening and closing procedures, cash handling, and shift responsibilities to support smooth daily operations.",
    "Resolved guest concerns professionally and efficiently, ensuring high standards of hospitality and satisfaction."
  ),
  "Shift Lead",
  "July 2022 -- January 2025", "Chicken Now | West Covina, CA",
  list(
    "Coordinated with third-party delivery platforms (DoorDash, UberEats, Postmates), auditing order accuracy and maintaining brand integrity across digital touchpoints.",
    "Identified opportunities to improve service flow and suggested layout adjustments that reduced guest wait time and improved front-of-house efficiency.",
    "Troubleshot POS system and equipment issues to minimize service delays and maintain transaction accuracy.",
    "Built rapport with a diverse customer base through clear communication, patience, and effective resolution of language barrier challenges.",
    "Maintained composure and accuracy during solo shifts and high-traffic rushes in a fast-paced environment."
  ),
  "Cashier"
) %>%
  detailed_entries(
    what = Title,
    when = Years,
    with = Company,
    why = Duties
  )
```

# University Projects

```{r}
tribble(
  ~ Years, ~ Course, ~ Duties, ~ Title,
  "Jan 2026 -- May 2026", "IBM 3202 -- Market Analysis and Control | Cal Poly Pomona",
  list(
    "Collaborated in a team to clean and analyze a CPP student dataset in RStudio, investigating whether race, gender, or major correlates with learning abilities and disabilities.",
    "Applied descriptive statistics, Cronbach's Alpha, and ANOVA testing to evaluate group differences and data reliability, interpreting results through p-value significance thresholds.",
    "Presented findings to class, translating complex statistical outputs into clear, accessible insights for a non-technical audience."
  ),
  "Student Outcomes and Equity Data Analysis | Data Analyst and Presenter",
  "Sep 2025 -- Dec 2025", "IBM 3012 -- Principles of Marketing Management | Cal Poly Pomona",
  list(
    "Led a 15-week team analysis of a real corporation including SWOT, VRIO, and external/internal environment assessments using professional research databases.",
    "Managed project timeline and task delegation using a Gantt Chart in Trello; final written report rated 95\\% and presentation rated 100\\% based on workplace skills criteria.",
    "Produced a video presentation using Camtasia and collaborated virtually with a team of 5 via Zoom and Google Meet.",
    "Demonstrated ethical and effective use of generative AI tools (ChatGPT, Microsoft Copilot) in research and professional writing."
  ),
  "Corporate Analysis Team Project | Project Lead and Editorial Reviewer",
  "Aug 2023 -- Nov 2023", "BUS 1010 -- Business Freshman Experience | Cal Poly Pomona",
  list(
    "Designed and distributed a survey capturing data from 40 students to quantify correlations between financial insecurity and academic performance.",
    "Leveraged Excel and Google Forms to aggregate and analyze data, identifying service gaps in campus mental health and financial resources.",
    "Presented findings to the University President and Dean, influencing discussions on resource reallocation and expansion of student support programs."
  ),
  "Socio-Economic Data Analysis and Stakeholder Advocacy | Researcher"
) %>%
  detailed_entries(
    what = Title,
    when = Years,
    with = Course,
    why = Duties
  )
```
